uplink.description: Real Time frame (0x04): normal indoor climate — temperature 22.5 C, relative humidity 45%
uplink._note: in-bounds synthetic frame; expected derived from running reference/upstream-codec.js (0xB1 Real Time): temp code 525 -> 22.5 C, hum code 90 -> 45% (upstream mislabels the humidity unit as C). Maps temperature->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity.

uplink.description: Real Time frame (0x04): sub-zero temperature -10 C, relative humidity 65%
uplink._note: in-bounds synthetic frame; expected derived from running reference/upstream-codec.js: temp code 200 -> -10 C, hum code 130 -> 65%.

uplink.description: Real Time frame (0x04): temperature sensor disconnected (code 1022) suppressed, humidity 55% retained
uplink._note: expected derived from reference/upstream-codec.js, which returns the string 'Deconnected Sensor' for temp code 1022; we suppress the absent temperature and emit only the valid humidity (code 110 -> 55%).

uplink.description: Real Time frame (0x04): temperature 22.5 C retained, humidity error (code 255) suppressed
uplink._note: expected derived from reference/upstream-codec.js, which returns the string 'Error' for hum code 255; we suppress the absent humidity and emit only the valid temperature.

uplink.description: Air Quality frame (0x03): daily summary — avg 58.5 C / 24.5%, with min/max temperature and humidity as extras
uplink._note: in-bounds synthetic daily-air frame; expected derived from running reference/upstream-codec.js (0xB1 Air Quality): tmin 506->20.6, tmax 792->49.2, tavg 885->58.5, hmin 42->21, hmax 153->76.5, havg 49->24.5. Avg temp/humidity map to air.temperature/air.relativeHumidity; min/max have no vocabulary key so they become camelCase extras.

uplink.description: Wrong product byte (0xB2 = Origin, not Origin+) returns an error
uplink._note: the shared upstream decoder happily decodes 0xB2 as 'Origin LoRa' (no product gating), but this is the Origin+ codec so a non-0xB1 product byte is rejected.

uplink.description: Unsupported message type (0x00 = Product Status) returns an error
uplink._note: upstream decodes Product Status (battery/version/status flags), but those messages carry no climate telemetry so this codec rejects every message type other than Real Time (0x04) and Air Quality (0x03).
